framework_instructions:
- Next.js 15 with Tailwind CSS v3.
- Use 'use client' for interactive components.
- Export pages as export default function PageName() not arrow functions.
- Only import packages already in package.json. Do NOT add new dependencies.
- Vercel design system: dark theme #0a0a0a bg, #ededed text, monochrome palette, minimal styling.
- No rainbow colors. No colored tag backgrounds. Status dots only for status indicators.
